subject: [PATCH 6/7 v2] mm/memcontrol: optimize stock usage for cgroup v2

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch optimizes memory usage in cgroup v2 by draining the stock of parent cgroups when a child is created, allowing other memcgs to reuse those pages. This is done because direct charges to non-leaf cgroups are rare in cgroup v2, and excess memory in parent cgroups can be wasted. The optimization does not apply to cgroup v1, where tasks can be attached to any cgroup in the hierarchy.
